results.name: floating island
results.description: A rock or island floating in the air.

results.name: floodpits
results.description: The region of Duskmourn associated with blue mana.

results.name: flopsie
results.description: King Bumi's giant, fluffy, terrifying pet.

results.name: flower crown
results.description: A hat or head adornment head that signifies or contains parts of flowering plants.

results.name: flow state student
results.description: Prismari student featured by artist Genel Jumalon

results.name: fly (insect)
results.description: a small winged insect with compound eyes

results.name: fog
results.description: Effects that can prevent all or most of the damage from an entire combat, similar to the card Fog. See also [pseudo-fog](https://tagger.scryfall.com/tags/card/pseudo-fog).

results.name: fog-selective
results.description: Fog effects where the damage prevention is or has the potential to be asymmetrical in some way, usually by exempting a subset of attackers/defenders.

results.name: foot
results.description: Depicts a foot entering from out of frame.

results.name: footwear
results.description: Clothing for the feet. See: shoe, boot, etc.

results.name: forced attacker
results.description: Creatures that have to attack every turn if they can

results.name: forced perspective
results.description: A perspective illusion that makes something look a lot closer than it is.

results.name: force draw
results.description: Force an opponent to draw cards, whether they like it or not. The lesser used mode on Ancestral Recall.

results.name: foreground
results.description: Uses secondary foreground elements to frame the main composition

results.name: fork
results.description: Great for poking your food or your foes

results.name: form
results.description: Cards with the intent of "transforming you" into something, usually involving various benefits and drawbacks.

results.name: formidable
results.description: Effects that care if you control creatures with a total power 8 or greater.

results.name: for scale
results.description: Uses objects of known size around the subject to demonstrate the subject's immense scale.
